message:
feat: implement custom mounts processing in runner

- Process devcontainer mounts field in Docker container creation
- Apply variable substitution to mount strings using SubstituteContext
- Use --mount flag for full Docker mount syntax support
- Substitute localWorkspaceFolder and containerWorkspaceFolder variables
- Support all devcontainer variable types in mount definitions
